chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Rev. Appln No.168 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of application. 26.08.2025 Mr. Rehman Ghani Khattak, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Uzair Rasool, Advocate for respondent No.3. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl. PG Sindh. ------------------------------- Counsel for the applicant files a statement wherein it is stated that both the parties have patched up the matter outside the Court and the applicant no longer wishes to press the instant revision application which is dismissed as withdrawn with all legal consequences. J U D G E Asif
